info.name: COMP3133 Assignment 1 - GraphQL API
info.description: GraphQL requests for Signup/Login and Employee CRUD + search. Set baseUrl (default http://localhost:4000) and token (Bearer JWT) in your Postman environment.

request.description: Create a user account. You can change variables.input values.
Run this first. Copy the returned token into your environment variable `token` (WITHOUT the word 'Bearer').
employee_photo can be a public image URL; server will upload it to Cloudinary and store the Cloudinary URL.
Replace variables.eid with an existing employee _id.
Replace variables.eid. Update fields inside variables.input as needed.
Replace variables.eid with the employee _id to delete.

item.name: Search employees by designation or department

request.description: Provide either designation or department (or both).
